page_subtitle: Register target servers for SSH remote remediation and test connectivity.
banner_no_master_key: The encryption master key is not configured, so remote targets cannot be registered (DS_APM_AI_CONFIG_ENCRYPTION_KEY)
health_mismatch_hint: Differs from the stored fingerprint — possible key rotation or tampering. Re-fetch and save the fingerprint in the edit form to resolve
delete_modal_content: Delete target '{{name}}'? This action cannot be undone.
keygen_no_master_key: The encryption master key is not configured, so a key cannot be generated (DS_APM_AI_CONFIG_ENCRYPTION_KEY)
public_key_hint: Add this public key to ~/.ssh/authorized_keys on the target server
hint_provide_credential: Generate a key or paste a PEM
rule_service_selectors_min: Specify at least one service selector
